The Ast2Asg.cpp is missing handlers for:
- selectionStatement (if/else)
- iterationStatement (while/for)
- All the expression types between assignment and additive (logical, relational, etc.)
- postfixExpression with array access and function calls

Let me add these missing handlers. First, let me see the full Ast2Asg.cpp to understand the structure better:
